entityTypes.name: platform_pages
entityTypes.description: Catalog of UI routes Atlas can recommend

title.description: Page name as shown in the UI

purpose.description: One sentence — what the user does on this page

tags.description: Keywords Atlas matches against user questions

entityTypes.name: agent_intros
entityTypes.description: Concierge-friendly summaries of peer agents (one-paragraph blurbs Atlas can quote when introducing a peer)

best_for.description: User-facing tasks this agent excels at

entityTypes.name: user_orientation_log
entityTypes.description: Every concierge interaction Atlas logs after replying to a user

topic.description: What the user asked about (agents | navigation | status | unknown)

route_recommended.description: UI route Atlas pointed the user to

agent_recommended.description: Peer agent slug Atlas recommended, if any
